basic_details.job_title: IIM Guwahati Assistant Administrative Officers Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati (IIM Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati (IIM Guwahati) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Assistant Administrative Officers Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIM Guwahati website. The last date to submit the application form is 06-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree in Management, Administration, Commerce, or related discipline from a recognized institution, Minimum 8 years of experience in academic administration or institutional operations is desirable, Proficiency in MS Office, documentation, and office management systems, Good communication, coordination, and interpersonal skills
qualification.details: Master’s Degree in Management, Administration, Commerce, or related discipline from a recognized institution. Minimum 8 years of experience in academic administration or institutional operations is desirable. Proficiency in MS Office, documentation, and office management systems. Good communication, coordination, and interpersonal skills.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Guwahati Assistant Administrative Officers Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Administrative Officers post at IIM Guwahati?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Assistant Administrative Officers post at IIM Guwahati is 06-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Administrative Officers position?
faq.answer: A Master’s Degree in Management, Administration, Commerce, or a related discipline from a recognized institution is required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 8 years of experience in academic administration or institutional operations is desirable for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Assistant Administrative Officers post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Administrative Officers post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Assistant Administrative Officers position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Administrative Officers position is Paylevel 08 under the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Assistant Administrative Officers recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the Assistant Administrative Officers post?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official IIM Guwahati website on or before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIM Guwahati located?
faq.answer: IIM Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations available?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.
